subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received which, though brief, yet the communications of hearts remain ever connected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید هر چند مختصر بود ولی مخابرات قلوب متصل است پیک
subcodes.subjects: @importance of community building, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat]
